# DiabeticDatasets

> DiabeticDatasets is an open catalog of deed-backed diabetic & medical instruction datasets, donated by
> Swarm and Bee LLC to the OpenDiabetic community — no charge, no strings. What makes it unique: flagship
> sets ship with a notarized TITLE DEED (generated by a Swarm model, graded by a two-judge tribunal, with a
> Merkle root recomputable from the rows) and every set is crystal clear — schema, real sample rows, size,
> and SHA-256 shown before download. You can recompute any file's SHA-256 in your own browser on the site.
> No PHI — open education + synthetic instruction sets only, never patient records.

## The donation (2026-06-21)
Swarm and Bee LLC donated its entire master catalog to the community: 99 packages, 3,355,906 cited pairs,
independently appraised at $50,169.92 — every file PII-scanned, scrubbed, and independently verified clean
before release. The gift is recorded on a public hash-chained ledger (DiabeticLedger receipt #14).

## The catalog
- 110 datasets total (99 community-donated + the curated diabetic-medical core).
- Honest counts: the headline is the sum across the catalog; some medical/CRE verticals include a superset
  plus specialty cuts of the same content, so the unique total is lower (the diabetic-medical core is
  417,196 unique pairs — not the naive 554K sum, which double-counts the specialty subsets).
- Verticals: grants, finance, legal, medical, CRE, capital-markets, signal, aviation, bee-hive, jelly,
  openalex, plus the cited diabetic core (foot-care, insulin, nutrition).
- Every full set is a public URL you can pull with curl + verify against its published SHA-256.

## Use it
Each dataset card shows its exact `curl` one-liner + a `load_dataset(...)` snippet. Pipeline-ready, no signup.

## The house
- OpenDiabetic (the hive): https://opendiabetic.com
- DiabeticLedger (verify the donation + every receipt): https://diabeticledger.com
- DiabeticModels (the builds): https://diabeticmodels.com
- DiabeticDocs (how to cook): https://diabeticdocs.com
- Operator: Swarm and Bee LLC (DBA Swarm & Bee AI), Jupiter FL · SAM UEI L9EXVH9L9VU6 · build@opendiabetic.com
